name: android-use
description: Control attached Android devices from Codex through adb, scrcpy, screenshots, and optional vision-model planning.

interface.longDescription: Android Use lets Codex inspect and control an attached Android device through adb, scrcpy, screenshots, input events, and an optional OpenAI-compatible vision-model planner inspired by Agent TARS and UI-TARS Desktop.
defaultPrompt: Show the connected Android device state
Take a screenshot and suggest the next action
Open scrcpy for my attached phone
